title: Pfaffian
summary: Defines Pfaffian-like symbolic invariants and the P_l_n family used in the Gauss–Bonnet-type application.

mathematicalContent.heading: Mathematical role
mathematicalContent.body: Defines Pfaffian-like symbolic invariants and the P_l_n family used in the Gauss–Bonnet-type application.

mathematicalContent.heading: Formal boundary
mathematicalContent.body: This page describes exactly the declarations present in Ambient/PE/Invariants/Pfaffian.lean; claims not represented by a declaration are not counted as verified.

correspondence.leanType: theorem P_l_n_weight (ell n : Nat) (hn : Even n) (hRange : ell <= n / 2) : (P_l_n ell n).1.weight = -(n : Int)

limitations: The displayed Lean results are checked relative to structures, typeclasses, certificates, or model laws supplied as hypotheses. The module does not by itself derive every interface field from a concrete geometric backend.
